top_signals.title: Asia Steps Up Currency Defense as Korea, Indonesia Vow Action
top_signals.summary: Asian authorities are ramping up their currency defense as high energy costs and bets that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates pressure them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
